name: Coffee Maker – Artisan Menu Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="cf-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PAPER_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PAPER_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf-banner" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
      <stop offset="50%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf-oval-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="400" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="cf-oval-glow" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="cf-oval-clip">
      <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="310" ry="370"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: warm kraft paper background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#cf-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: subtle horizontal paper lines -->
  <line x1="0" y1="180" x2="1080" y2="178" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.04"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="360" x2="1080" y2="358" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.03"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="540" x2="1080" y2="542" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.04"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="720" x2="1080" y2="718" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.03"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="900" x2="1080" y2="902" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.04"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: outer ornamental border -->
  <rect x="28" y="28" width="1024" height="1294" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.25"/>
  <rect x="38" y="38" width="1004" height="1274" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: corner ornaments -->
  <g fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.35">
    <polygon points="28,28 48,38 38,48"/>
    <polygon points="1052,28 1032,38 1042,48"/>
    <polygon points="28,1322 48,1312 38,1302"/>
    <polygon points="1052,1322 1032,1312 1042,1302"/>
  </g>
  <line x1="22"   y1="28"   x2="34"   y2="28"   stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="28"   y1="22"   x2="28"   y2="34"   stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="1046" y1="28"   x2="1058" y2="28"   stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="1052" y1="22"   x2="1052" y2="34"   stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="22"   y1="1322" x2="34"   y2="1322" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="28"   y1="1316" x2="28"   y2="1328" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="1046" y1="1322" x2="1058" y2="1322" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="1052" y1="1316" x2="1052" y2="1328" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: top arch banner -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="148" fill="url(#cf-banner)"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="148" rx="200" ry="40" fill="url(#cf-banner)"/>
  <line x1="60" y1="18" x2="1020" y2="18" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/>
  <line x1="60" y1="24" x2="1020" y2="24" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: store name in banner -->
  <text x="540" y="88"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="42" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PAPER_TOP" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="540" y="122" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="10">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_TAGLINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: decorative divider below banner -->
  <line x1="200" y1="178" x2="880" y2="178" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="178" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="178" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="880" cy="178" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="188" x2="880" y2="188" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.1"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: introducing label -->
  <text x="540" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_INTRO_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: oval ornamental rings -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="338" ry="398" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="326" ry="386" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="316" ry="376" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: dark oval bg + glow -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="310" ry="370" fill="url(#cf-oval-bg)"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="610" rx="310" ry="370" fill="url(#cf-oval-glow)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: product image clipped to oval -->
  <g clip-path="url(#cf-oval-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="230" y="240" width="620" height="740" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 12: oval top ornament -->
  <line x1="390" y1="244" x2="690" y2="244" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: product name below oval -->
  <text x="540" y="1058" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="62" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="540" y="1108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="32" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 14: three-star ornamental divider -->
  <line x1="200" y1="1132" x2="440" y2="1132" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="540" y="1137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7">PLACEHOLDER_ORNAMENT</text>
  <line x1="640" y1="1132" x2="880" y2="1132" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 15: feature line — menu description style -->
  <text x="540" y="1170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: price section -->
  <line x1="60" y1="1200" x2="1020" y2="1200" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>
  <text x="60"  y="1262" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="72" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="60"  y="1292" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="60" y1="1312" x2="1020" y2="1312" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 17: CTA + contact -->
  <rect x="60" y="1324" width="340" height="50" rx="0" fill="url(#cf-cta)"/>
  <text x="230" y="1355" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PAPER_TOP" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="500" y="1356" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>
